mapper.select: SELECT search_term,search_count, -- 计算有效热度分数 search_count / POWER(1.5, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), updated_at) <= 15 THEN 0 ELSE DATEDIFF(NOW(), updated_at) - 15 END ) as hot_score FROM search_hot WHERE updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND search_count >= 10 -- 最小搜索次数限制 ORDER BY hot_score DESC limit 10;
